_note: Post-Whisper domain corrections for base.en's CONSISTENT garbles. Each rule matches consecutive words (case/punctuation-insensitive) and replaces them with `to`. Rule of thumb: only add UNAMBIGUOUS fixes — never map a bare real word that Joel also says legitimately (e.g. do NOT map 'data'->'theta', since 'data' is used for real). Add new ones as we spot them; every fix helps all future videos.
